zh.lifeSummary: 當Morwyl ferch Ednywain於1048年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾易納時，她的父親Ednywain I Bendew ap Neiniad of Tegeingl28歲，母親Gwerfyl ferch Lluddocca26歲。她於1064年與Owain Ap Edwin Lord Of Tegaingl在威爾士結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1095年在英國威爾斯福林爾享年47歲。

zh-hans.Iona, Argyllshire, Scotland: 英国苏格兰阿吉爾易納
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Morwyl ferch Ednywain于1048年出生在英国苏格兰阿吉爾易納时，她的父亲Ednywain I Bendew ap Neiniad of Tegeingl28岁，母亲Gwerfyl ferch Lluddocca26岁。她于1064年与Owain Ap Edwin Lord Of Tegaingl在威尔士结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1095年在英国威尔斯福林爾享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

variants.name: Ferg
meanings: German: occupational name for a ferryman, Middle High German verje, verge.

en.lifeSummary: When Morwyl ferch Ednywain was born in 1048, in Iona, Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Ednywain I Bendew ap Neiniad of Tegeingl, was 28 and her mother, Gwerfyl ferch Lluddocca, was 26. She married Owain Ap Edwin Lord Of Tegaingl in 1064, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1095, in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 47.

fr.Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Wales: Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Morwyl ferch Ednywain est née en 1048, à Iona, Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ednywain I Bendew ap Neiniad of Tegeingl, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Gwerfyl ferch Lluddocca, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Owain Ap Edwin Lord Of Tegaingl en 1064, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1095, à Flintshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Wales: Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Morwyl ferch Ednywain 1048 in Iona, Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ednywain I Bendew ap Neiniad of Tegeingl 28 und ihre Mutter Gwerfyl ferch Lluddocca 26. Sie hat 1064 in Wales Owain Ap Edwin Lord Of Tegaingl geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1095 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Flintshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Morwyl ferch Ednywain è nata il nel 1048 nel Iona, Argyll, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Ednywain I Bendew ap Neiniad of Tegeingl, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Gwerfyl ferch Lluddocca, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Owain Ap Edwin Lord Of Tegaingl nel 1064, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1095, nel Flintshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Morwyl ferch Ednywainが1048年にイギリススコットランドアルグイルアイオナで生まれた時，父Ednywain I Bendew ap Neiniad of Tegeinglは28歳，母Gwerfyl ferch Lluddoccaは26歳であった。1064年にウェールズでOwain Ap Edwin Lord Of Tegainglと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1095年にイギリスウェールズフリントシュアイアで47歳で死去した。

ko.Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Wales: 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르 리스 와이 코드
ko.lifeSummary: Morwyl ferch Ednywain(이)가 1048년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 이오나에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ednywain I Bendew ap Neiniad of Tegeingl(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwerfyl ferch Lluddocca(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1064년 웨일스에서 Owain Ap Edwin Lord Of Tegaingl(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1095년 영국 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Morwyl ferch Ednywain nasceu em 1048, em Iona, Argyll, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ednywain I Bendew ap Neiniad of Tegeingl, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Gwerfyl ferch Lluddocca, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Owain Ap Edwin Lord Of Tegaingl em 1064, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1095, em Flintshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 47 anos.

ru.Llys Y Coed, Flintshire, Wales: ллиз и коед, флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Morwyl ferch Ednywain родилась в 1048 г. в местности иона, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ednywain I Bendew ap Neiniad of Tegeingl было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwerfyl ferch Lluddocca, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Owain Ap Edwin Lord Of Tegaingl в 1064 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1095 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Morwyl ferch Ednywain nació en 1048, en Iona, Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Ednywain I Bendew ap Neiniad of Tegeingl, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Gwerfyl ferch Lluddocca, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Owain Ap Edwin Lord Of Tegaingl en 1064, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1095, en Flintshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 47 años.
